roles.title: Full-stack Software Engineer
highlights: Developed enterprise systems for securities companies including online stock pricing boards and online trading platforms
Built business applications using .NET Framework, Adobe Flex, and Oracle Database
Worked on large-scale enterprise software deployed for financial institutions and government organizations

roles.title: Senior Software Engineer
highlights: Served as a major contributor to FPT.SmartCore, an enterprise backend-to-frontend framework
Enabled rapid business feature development through metadata and database-driven configuration
Leveraged Oracle stored procedures to optimize enterprise business processing
Built features that could run consistently across both web and .NET desktop applications with similar UI and UX
Delivered enterprise solutions for securities companies, Hanoi Stock Exchange, and the State Bank of Vietnam

roles.title: Technical Leader
highlights: Led technical development for the Powersell.net platform
Contributed to backend and frontend system development
Worked with search and indexing capabilities using Solr

roles.title: Full-stack Software Engineer
highlights: Took over and stabilized the project after the previous engineering team left
Developed and maintained full-stack application features
Worked with GraphQL-based APIs and MongoDB-backed services

roles.title: Senior Software Engineer
highlights: Developed a food and beverage research platform for collecting consumer research data and generating analytical reports
Built full-stack product features using GraphQL, Node.js, MongoDB, and React.js
Worked on a monolithic system architecture deployed on a centralized server infrastructure
Contributed to research workflows that helped clients improve food and beverage products

roles.title: Software Engineer
highlights: Led frontend engineering efforts for OxStreet.com, a sneaker marketplace acquired by Carousell
Mentored engineers on type-safe development practices in Next.js and TypeScript
Balanced engineering quality with strategic product delivery priorities
Developed marketplace and e-commerce platform features for buyers and sellers

roles.title: Senior Software Engineer
highlights: Took ownership of the inventory-sync backend platform integrating Carousell sellers with Shopify
Maintained inventory synchronization between Carousell and merchants' Shopify stores
Led migration of inventory-sync services into Carousell infrastructure
Published and integrated the Carousell Shopify App as the frontend interface for inventory-sync capabilities

roles.title: Engineering Manager
highlights: Managed a cross-functional team of 6 engineers across QA, Backend, Web, iOS, and Android
Led development of Carousell platform features including order post-processing workflows
Contributed to Trust and Safety initiatives for fraud prevention and malicious behavior detection
Built backend services using Golang and maintained legacy Python services
Implemented microservice and event-driven architectures for scalable trust-processing systems

roles.title: Technical Architect
highlights: Led the frontend engineering team to build a fast and smooth user experience for both online buyers and seller POS workflows
Architected and developed frontend systems using Next.js
Contributed to the rapid growth of the platform in Vietnam's e-commerce market
Focused on scalable frontend architecture and performance optimization
